notes: This batch processes only HEAT_DUMPS/20260225T070252Z/repo_archive__moved_out_of_git and treats it as historical nested archive lineage, not as current runtime authority.

The object is a coherent nested archive root with ARCHIVE_INDEX_v1.json, CACHE__HIGH_ENTROPY__RECENT__PURGEABLE, DEEP_ARCHIVE__LOW_ENTROPY__MILESTONES_ONLY, an empty direct HEAT_DUMPS shell, and OPS_LOGS.

ARCHIVE_INDEX_v1.json records one latest checkpoint under archive/DEEP_ARCHIVE__LOW_ENTROPY__MILESTONES_ONLY/CHECKPOINTS/SYSTEM_V3_A1_TUNING_20260225T011355Z and lists ten recent heat dumps under archive/CACHE__HIGH_ENTROPY__RECENT__PURGEABLE/HEAT_DUMPS.
The nested cache subtree is effectively a heat-dump carrier: 25172 files, 1154 directories, and only one meaningful immediate child, HEAT_DUMPS.

Representative cache rotations preserve A1 working runs, real-loop history, run-surface rotations, and save-export rotations, including moved test families like TEST_A1_PACKET_ZIP and TEST_STATE_TRANSITION_MUTATION.
The nested deep archive is thin and milestone-oriented, preserving exactly five SYSTEM_V3_A1_TUNING checkpoints from 20260225T004854Z through 20260225T011355Z.

The latest checkpoint manifest binds to RUN_REAL_LOOP_DEEP_0023 and still references source save exports under system_v3/runs/_save_exports, which is a live-era path regime rather than this mirror path.
The direct root HEAT_DUMPS child is empty even though recent heat history is heavily populated under the nested cache subtree.

OPS_LOGS preserve seven cleanup bookkeeping results from 20260225T005927Z through 20260225T051102Z, which postdates the latest deep checkpoint and proves maintenance continued after milestone capture.

Rotation manifests and cleanup logs still reference live absolute paths under /home/ratchet/Desktop/Codex Ratchet/archive/... and system_v3/..., so relocation into the later heat dump did not rewrite internal path memory.

Checkpoint notes also preserve internal path drift, with early build logs targeting /archive/CHECKPOINTS/... and later build logs targeting /archive/DEEP_ARCHIVE__LOW_ENTROPY__MILESTONES_ONLY/CHECKPOINTS/....
